textByHash.00001778057eb637505c55fef1022e9b3bde7d00: The King and she have never seen eye-to-eye, but I think if you approach her you may find her quite reasonable.

textByHash.1df377c8abd8b69c887087af3f96a623b988a300: Many have tried to capture her attention, but she has yet to be impressed by any of them.
textByHash.1e28125586d2b5f996ae41cc757c35d66d127c76: If you bring me another, I can correct it. Are there any other matters in which I may be of assistance?
textByHash.1e79258ac034337123aebf97c9ed8236fef8e626: Talking to the Prince and Princess, Your Royal Highness. I believe they have something to ask you.
textByHash.20f276db2b08af220c0bdfbcb4bc839f0d586028: The sailor who brought you here from the mainland would be the first to see any suspicious visitors.
textByHash.271d80d0db2ebc655efad3ae3c8036dd929cd742: King Vargas has found himself with little to do now that you are the regent. He intended, at first, to return to adventuring.
textByHash.2a4817012f00af92fda75077f8237a26a98019d7: You should go talk to Queen Sigrid of Etceteria.
textByHash.2bb8bfd028aee768f056a0a5924285eecfc4a753: Your Royal Highness, I should tell you right away that killing the people of this Kingdom will not make you popular with anyone.
textByHash.2bf94b1ce37129a700d99157cf482e0fdf08d100: I think you may find that talking to him would be a good way to start.
textByHash.3593e1020fb3d1e76bbb30f973927bd04304ba29: He has been trying to rule once more, in your absence. However, he has once again quarrelled with the Queen of Etceteria.
textByHash.36ec8d581d029b17c080391f83745ddd05c50678: Assuming that nobody presently living in Miscellania would have taken them,
textByHash.3b9d77fa80c54f4b72b81fe940878f7834d8071a: Do you have another copy of the prince's anthem for me to correct?
textByHash.40f6c62c24859e1de6ce32c10499daeaf38c3a29: I'm afraid you will need more free spaces in your bank to hold all the items your subjects have collected.
textByHash.48d4ab4e82d44355890118e3eece6e3b90273402: You are the regent of this kingdom, Your Royal Highness. I would urge you to reconsider.
textByHash.4a40e24a6e104fb6544e46c3a8745c2d74d6fcc3: She is fond of jewellery, and of course she collects bows. She is also quite the conversationalist.
textByHash.4e8e2d398570d80b90b8b0be19fa1a6a8e2a2bd1: There you go. Are there any other matters in which I may be of assistance?

textByHash.573d2d420446c249e7f8cc7c7547ebc49d9d7334: You see, the people are worried that war will break out again.
textByHash.59f7791fbc9f08f8fac62df26cf8d763b34c19a2: Such as the predicament we are now in.

textByHash.9c8a2ac495037639029088d7a79a68fa1756e850: King Vargas was once a brave and noble adventurer, well-loved by his subjects. Unfortunately, he was cursed while seeking a quest in the icelands to the north, and is now unable to reign.
textByHash.9eaf59907796f247182f4d40136d90f4ecf7d44b: Your subjects are worried about the possibility of war, but they are still happy to work for you.

textByHash.a78adc2915e7f73d27c4e53991a349090972f436: Many have tried to capture her attention, but you are the first to succeed.
textByHash.a8c241f026154a09cd86e8e505fffcadeac216a2: May you bring success and prosperity to Miscellania and to all of its people.
textByHash.aa01618197ff0aa406132bedb40cc3c168189ee8: You should get another copy of the anthem.
